review_text: So I bought the 'Turbo-Vac 5000' last week. Honestly? It's a mixed bag. The suction is incredible—it picked up a penny from under the rug! And it's super quiet, which my cat appreciates. But oh man, the battery life is a joke. It died after 15 minutes. Also, the plastic handle feels like it's going to snap any second. For $300, I expected better build quality. I'm keeping it because I hate returning things, but if I had to choose again, I'd definitely go with a Dyson instead.
